heading: Supplemental National Forest Reforestation Fund; establishment; duration; authorization of appropriations
label: 576c Supplemental National Forest Reforestation Fund; establishment; duration; authorization of appropriations
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary of Agriculture shall establish a “Supplemental National Forest Reforestation Fund”, and transfer to that fund beginning with the fiscal year, commencing , and ending on , such amounts as may be appropriated therefor. There is hereby authorized to be appropriated for such purpose for each of the fiscal years during such period the sum of $65,000,000.July 1, 1972September 30, 1987
